data.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — 5/7 ACs fully verified, 2 ACs (config key + dependent test) require orchestrator to insert brainstorm.max_feasibility_cycles=2 after brainstorm.enforce_entry_gate=true in .claude/dso-config.conf (sandbox prevents sub-agent writes to .claude/ files from persisting across bash invocations).
